entries.name: TokenSetRatio_both_empty_strings_deviation
entries.deviation_note: RapidFuzz issue #110 — empty-input gate fires BEFORE identity short-circuit; returns 0.0 (NOT 1.0)

entries.name: TokenSetRatio_both_pure_separator_deviation
entries.deviation_note: RapidFuzz issue #110 — both Tokenise to []; post-Tokenise empty-set gate fires; returns 0.0 (NOT 1.0)

entries.name: TokenSetRatio_three_way_max_combined_wins
entries.derivation_note: intersection={world}; r1=r2=10/16=0.625; r3=ratio("world hello","world peace")=14/22=7/11; r3 wins

entries.name: TokenSetRatio_dedup_set_equal
entries.derivation_note: A_set={alpha,beta}; B_set={alpha,beta}; both diffs empty; subset short-circuit

entries.name: TokenSetRatio_unicode_reorder
entries.derivation_note: Tokenise produces same set on both sides; both diffs empty; subset short-circuit
